education.degree: B.S. in Computer Science; B.S. in Mathematics
details: \textbf{Relevant Coursework:} Data Structures, Algorithms, Computer Architecture, Systems Programming, Software Engineering, Software Methodology, Databases, Cryptography, Number Theory, Linear Algebra, Tensor Networks in AI, Calculus 1-4

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Enhanced Rutgers' myCommunity \textbf{WordPress} platform (hosted on \textbf{Pantheon}) by leading new feature development and infrastructure updates, serving \textbf{70,000+ students} and \textbf{1,000+ organizations} with high reliability and scalability.
Automated event management workflows by engineering custom \textbf{PHP} plugins and optimizing database queries, reducing manual admin effort and improving site performance by \textbf{50\%}.

Strengthened authentication and access control by implementing enterprise SSO using \textbf{Shibboleth (SAML)} and \textbf{OIDC/OAuth2} enabling seamless access for \textbf{70,000+ users} across university systems.
Improved API clarity and integration by designing and documenting internal \textbf{RESTful APIs} using \textbf{OpenAPI 3.0} and \textbf{Swagger UI}, enabling faster developer onboarding.

Eliminated manual club-record updates by building a real-time synchronization bridge between Rutgers' Club Database and myCommunity using \textbf{PHP} and scheduled \textbf{cron jobs}, automatically syncing records for \textbf{1,000+ clubs} across 3 campuses.
Modernized user experience by refactoring WordPress themes using \textbf{JavaScript} and \textbf{CSS}, implementing dark mode, improving accessibility, and ensuring responsive design across devices.

Developed \textbf{React} web demos and \textbf{Flutter} mobile prototypes to showcase new features and user flows, enabling stakeholders to validate ideas quickly and accelerating adoption into the production application.

experience.title: Software Engineer Intern
bullets: Built secure and scalable backend features in \textbf{Go} for a healthcare SaaS platform.

Refactored the backend \textbf{Go} codebase into a consistent \textbf{controller--service--repository} architecture, reducing code duplication, improving maintainability, and enabling faster onboarding for new developers.
Configured \textbf{Google Cloud Platform} IAM for role-based access control and deployed \textbf{PostgreSQL} Cloud SQL, ensuring secure and compliant management of sensitive healthcare data.

projects.name: AI Playlist Generator
bullets: Developed an AI-powered playlist generator using \textbf{Spring Boot microservices} for curated Spotify/SoundCloud playlists.
Built connections to \textbf{Spotify} and \textbf{SoundCloud APIs} for authentication, metadata retrieval, and playlist export.
Deployed containerized services to \textbf{AWS ECS Fargate} using \textbf{Docker}, managing private images in \textbf{AWS ECR}.
Secured external traffic via an \textbf{AWS Application Load Balancer}, exposing only the API Gateway to users.
Delivered a responsive frontend with \textbf{Next.js (React)} and \textbf{Shadcn}, deployed to \textbf{Vercel} for seamless user interaction.

projects.name: SSingh.Net Music
bullets: Built a full-stack music blog featuring a \textbf{Node.js/Express.js} backend and a \textbf{React} frontend with \textbf{Tailwind CSS}.
Designed and implemented a RESTful API for managing albums, artists, and tags, enabling dynamic content updates.
Structured relational data with \textbf{MySQL} and served media assets from an \textbf{AWS S3} bucket for high availability.

projects.name: Whisk
bullets: Built a cross-platform \textbf{React Native} cooking app with barcode scanning for pantry management and recipe discovery.
Integrated \textbf{Groq} to generate LLM-powered recipe suggestions grounded in the user's current pantry inventory.
Designed a \textbf{Node.js/Express.js} REST API and \textbf{Prisma} ORM against a \textbf{Supabase} Postgres database.
Wrote unit and integration tests with \textbf{Jest} to validate API logic and data layer behavior.

projects.name: CLox
bullets: Implemented a bytecode compiler and virtual machine in \textbf{C} for Lox, designing a single-pass pipeline that translated source code to custom bytecode for efficient execution.
Built a custom mark-and-sweep \textbf{garbage collector} to automatically manage memory, reducing runtime memory leaks.
